# GitSnip — Full API Reference for AI
> Download any GitHub subdirectory as a zip. No git clone needed.
> Version: 1.0.0 | Updated: 2026-03

---

## What is GitSnip?

GitSnip is a web tool and API that downloads a specific subdirectory from any
public GitHub repository and returns it as a zip file. It is designed to be
easy for both humans and AI agents to use.

Use cases:
- Download a plugin, template, or component from a large repo
- Avoid cloning an entire repository just to get one folder
- Programmatically fetch code snippets in scripts or AI workflows

---

## Web Interface

URL: https://gitsnip.cc

### Method 1: Paste and download
1. Open https://gitsnip.cc
2. Paste a GitHub tree URL
3. Click Download

### Method 2: URL replacement (fastest)
Replace `github.com` with `gitsnip.cc` in any GitHub tree URL:
  Input:  https://github.com/owner/repo/tree/branch/path
  Output: https://gitsnip.cc/owner/repo/tree/branch/path

Opening the gitsnip.cc URL in a browser triggers an immediate download.

---

## REST API

Base URL: https://api.gitsnip.cc

### Authentication (optional but recommended)
Header: X-GitHub-Token: ghp_your_personal_access_token

Without token: 60 GitHub API requests/hour per IP
With token:  5,000 GitHub API requests/hour

---

### GET /v1/download

Downloads a GitHub directory as a zip file.

Parameters:
  url  (required)  URL-encoded GitHub tree URL

Returns: application/zip binary stream

Examples:

  # Basic download
  GET https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/download?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fanthropics%2Fclaude-code%2Ftree%2Fmain%2Fplugins%2Ffeature-dev

  # curl
  curl -L "https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/download?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fanthropics%2Fclaude-code%2Ftree%2Fmain%2Fplugins%2Ffeature-dev" -o feature-dev.zip

  # With token
  curl -L -H "X-GitHub-Token: ghp_xxxx" "https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/download?url=..." -o output.zip

  # JavaScript fetch
  const res = await fetch('https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/download?url=' + encodeURIComponent(githubUrl))
  const blob = await res.blob()

  # Python
  import requests, urllib.parse
  url = 'https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/tree/main/plugins/feature-dev'
  r = requests.get('https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/download', params={'url': url}, stream=True)
  with open('feature-dev.zip', 'wb') as f:
      f.write(r.content)

---

### GET /v1/info

Returns metadata about a directory without downloading it.
Useful for AI agents to inspect a directory before deciding to download.

Parameters:
  url  (required)  URL-encoded GitHub tree URL

Returns: JSON

  {
    "provider": "github",
    "owner": "anthropics",
    "repo": "claude-code",
    "branch": "main",
    "path": "plugins/feature-dev",
    "fileCount": 5,
    "totalSize": 12840,
    "files": [
      { "path": "plugins/feature-dev/README.md", "size": 1204 },
      { "path": "plugins/feature-dev/prompt.md", "size": 11636 }
    ]
  }

Example:
  curl "https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/info?url=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fanthropics%2Fclaude-code%2Ftree%2Fmain%2Fplugins%2Ffeature-dev"

---

### GET /health

Returns service status.

  { "ok": true, "service": "gitsnip-worker", "version": "1.0.0" }

---

## Error Responses

All errors return JSON:

  {
    "code":    "RATE_LIMITED",
    "message": "GitHub API rate limit exceeded.",
    "hint":    "Provide X-GitHub-Token header to get 5,000 requests/hour."
  }

Error codes:
  INVALID_URL      400  Missing/invalid url param, or empty path
  UNAUTHORIZED     401  GitHub token invalid or expired
  NOT_FOUND        404  Repository, branch, or path not found
  TOO_MANY_FILES   413  Directory contains >500 files
  TOO_LARGE        413  Directory exceeds 100 MB
  RATE_LIMITED     429  GitHub API rate limit exceeded
  GITHUB_ERROR     502  GitHub API returned unexpected error
  INTERNAL_ERROR   500  Unexpected server error

---

## Limits

  Max files per request:  500
  Max total size:         100 MB
  Rate limit (no token):  20 requests/min/IP (Cloudflare) + 60 req/hour (GitHub)
  Rate limit (with token):20 requests/min/IP (Cloudflare) + 5,000 req/hour (GitHub)

---

## URL Format Reference

GitSnip accepts any GitHub tree URL:

  https://github.com/{owner}/{repo}/tree/{branch}/{path}
  https://github.com/{owner}/{repo}/tree/{branch}          (not supported — path required)

The URL must point to a directory (tree), not a file (blob).

Shareable GitSnip download links have the same structure, just with a different domain:
  https://gitsnip.cc/{owner}/{repo}/tree/{branch}/{path}

---

## AI Agent Workflow Example

1. User asks: "Download the feature-dev plugin from anthropics/claude-code"
2. Agent calls /v1/info to verify the directory exists and check file count
3. Agent generates a shareable link: https://gitsnip.cc/anthropics/claude-code/tree/main/plugins/feature-dev
4. Agent presents the link to the user OR calls /v1/download to get the zip directly

---

## Human Documentation

https://gitsnip.cc/docs

https://gitsnip.cc/llms.txt
